principalInvestigator.name: Kangjin Kim, DPH
principalInvestigator.title: Assistant Professor
principalInvestigator.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
principalInvestigator.bio: Kangjin Kim works on statistical and computational methods for high-dimensional biomedical data, with applications to statistical genetics, multi-omics, survival and prediction modeling, respiratory disease, and precision medicine.

background.label: Education
background.value: BS in Statistics; MPH/DPH in Biostatistics

background.label: Postdoctoral Research
background.value: Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women’s Hospital

graduateStudents.name: Jihyeon Lee
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: Her research focuses on aging, cognitive decline, and inflammation based on biostatistics and data analysis, with the goal of contributing to data-driven decision-making in healthcare.

graduateStudents.name: Jun-Jae Won
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: His research interests include biostatistics, survival analysis, causal inference, and microbiome data analysis, with a focus on developing statistical methods for high-dimensional biological data. He is involved in sTMAT, PRISM-AE, and NAFLD-CKD propensity score analysis projects.

graduateStudents.name: Eunjae Han
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: Her research interests include bioinformatics and statistical methods for studying omics data and disease-related biomarkers.

undergraduateResearchers.name: Seoyoung Bae
undergraduateResearchers.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
undergraduateResearchers.bio: Her research interests include statistical learning, microbiome data analysis, and integrative analysis of biomedical and environmental health data.
